task.dependencies:
DCs:
e1: clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs1, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index1, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease1, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain1, heart_disease: $heart_disease1, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping1, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport1, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability1, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing1, stroke: $stroke1, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain1), clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs2, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index2, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease2, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain2, heart_disease: $heart_disease2, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping2, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport2, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability2, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing2, stroke: $stroke2, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain2), $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1 == $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1 != $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2 -> #fail.
e2: clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs1, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index1, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease1, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain1, heart_disease: $heart_disease1, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping1, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport1, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability1, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing1, stroke: $stroke1, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain1), clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs2, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index2, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease2, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain2, heart_disease: $heart_disease2, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping2, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport2, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability2, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing2, stroke: $stroke2, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain2), $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1 == $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, $post_opqeq_five_d_index1 != $post_opqeq_five_d_index2 -> #fail.

e9: clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs1, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index1, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease1, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain1, heart_disease: $heart_disease1, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping1, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport1, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability1, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing1, stroke: $stroke1, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain1), clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs2, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index2, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease2, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain2, heart_disease: $heart_disease2, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping2, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport2, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability2, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing2, stroke: $stroke2, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain2), $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1 == $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, $pre_opq_disability1 != $pre_opq_disability2 -> #fail.

e15: clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs1, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index1, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease1, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted1, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain1, heart_disease: $heart_disease1, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping1, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport1, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability1, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing1, stroke: $stroke1, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility1, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain1), clean(procedurevalue: $procedurevalue2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_stairs2, post_opqeq_five_d_index: $post_opqeq_five_d_index2, kidney_disease: $kidney_disease2, hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted: $hip_replacementeq_five_d_index_post_opq_predicted2, hip_replacement_post_opq_pain: $hip_replacement_post_opq_pain2, heart_disease: $heart_disease2, hip_replacement_post_opq_limping: $hip_replacement_post_opq_limping2, hip_replacement_post_opq_transport: $hip_replacement_post_opq_transport2, pre_opq_disability: $pre_opq_disability2, post_opq_activity: $post_opq_activity2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, hip_replacement_post_opq_washing: $hip_replacement_post_opq_washing2, stroke: $stroke2, pre_opq_mobility: $pre_opq_mobility2, hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain: $hip_replacement_pre_opq_night_pain2), $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1 == $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, $pre_opq_mobility1 != $pre_opq_mobility2 -> #fail.
